entry.title: New: CR 24-81 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 122, CD1 (2024) to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget by 1) amending Section 2, Estimated Revenues, by increasing Carryover/Savings from the Water Fund by $250,000; 2) amending Section 3.B.21.a.(1), Department of Water Supply, Administration Program - Water Fund, General, by increasing the appropriation for Category B - Operations & Equipment by $250,000 and adding a new condition for up to $250,000 to be used for professional services for a contract to prepare a feasibility study and management or business plan for the new East Maui Water Authority; and 3) adjusting the totals accordingly.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
